{{Quote|I can't abide those Jawas! Disgusting creatures!|C-3PO, referring to Iasa|<ref name="Episode 4">{{Film|IV}}</ref>}}
'''Iasa''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Jawa/Legends|Jawa]] who lived on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].<ref name="CCG">{{CCG|set=Special Edition Limited|cardname=Iasa, The Traitor of Jawa Canyon}}</ref>

==Biography==
[[File:Iasa.png|thumb|left|180px|Iasa eyes Luke Skywalker's landspeeder.]]
A personal friend of [[Chief/Legends|Chief]] [[Kalit/Legends|Kalit]], Iasa was entrusted with Kalit's [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] and [[Sandcrawler/Legends|sandcrawler]], in addition to the safety of his wife and [[Shaman/Legends|shaman]], [[Aved Luun]]. When Kalit returned, he found his credits spent, his sandcrawler sold and Aved nowhere in sight.<ref name="CCG" />

When [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] arrived at [[Chalmun's Spaceport Cantina/Legends|Chalmun's Cantina]] with [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Ben Kenobi]], [[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]] and [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]] in [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]], Iasa approached Skywalker's [[X-34 landspeeder/Legends|X-34 landspeeder]] but was shooed away by the young [[Skywalker family/Legends|Skywalker]].<ref name="Episode 4" />

==Appearances==
*{{Film|IV}} {{1st}}
